docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-27-2009 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO NOV-19-2009 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. IF NO APPEARANCE, THE CASE WILL BE SET FOR FURTHER PROGRESS REPORT IN LATE FEB. 2010. IF NO APPEARANCE AT THE FEB. 2010 PROGRESS REPORT THE CASE WILL BE SET FOR FURTHER PROGRESS REPORT IN MAY 2010. IF NO APPEARANCE AT THE MAY 2010 PROGRESS REPORT THEN THE CASE SHALL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE.
